name: Gazpacho
description: Andalusian chilled tomato soup — blended raw vegetables served ice-cold, perfect for hot summer days.

recipeInstructions.text: Combine tomatoes, cucumber, pepper, onion, and garlic in a blender. Blend until completely smooth.
With the blender running, drizzle in the olive oil to emulsify. Add vinegar and water.
Season well with salt. Blend again and taste — adjust vinegar and salt as needed.
Strain through a fine-mesh sieve for a silky texture. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Serve chilled with ice cubes and drizzle with extra olive oil.

notes.title: Best tomatoes
notes.text: Use the ripest, most flavourful tomatoes you can find — this makes or breaks the soup.
